title: Archer's Enchants
description: Six new Vanilla-style Enchantments. Better Combat compatible!
body:
![Archer's Enchants header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec3b9b5d8e7e26bdcf74d9096364c87059fcb32c.png)

Archer's Enchants adds six new vanilla-style enchantments:
- Lunging: Increases the strike distance of swords and axes
- Reaching: Increases the breaking distance of tools
- Quick Strike: Increases the attack speed of swords and axes
- Experienced Cut: Gives more xp from mobs
- Experienced Break: Gives more xp from blocks
- Reinforced: Adds Armor Toughness

Compatible with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)!

[Join my Discord!](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)
